## Description
<!-- A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see. -->

## Problem
<!-- Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe. -->
<!-- E.g. I'm always frustrated when [...] -->

## Proposed Solution
<!-- Describe the solution you'd like to see. -->

## Alternatives Considered
<!-- Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered. -->

## Impact
<!-- How would this feature benefit users of the project? -->

## Relevance to Scene/Component
<!-- If applicable, describe how this feature relates to specific parts of the project:
  - Fluid simulation (fluid.ts)
  - Text layout (main.ts)
  - Character palette (palette.ts)
  - Obstacle carving (obstacles.ts)
  - UI/UX (index.html)
-->

## Additional Context
<!-- Add any other context, screenshots, or mockups about the feature request here. -->

## Checklist
<!-- Mark completed items with an x. -->
- [ ] I have searched existing issues to ensure this is not a duplicate
- [ ] I have described the problem this feature would solve
- [ ] I have suggested a concrete solution
- [ ] I have considered alternatives
